title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
